Hearing held. ARGUED. Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT UBER TECHNOLOGIES, INC.'S Motion To Compel Arbitration And To Stay Proceedings

Uber Technologies, Inc.'s Motion to Compel Arbitration is GRANTED. (see word minutes for complete ruling)

Order is signed.
